recommendations.title: #Iamhere
recommendations.overview: Stéphane lives a quiet life as an eminent French Chef but when he decides to visit Soo, a mysterious Korean lady he fell in love with on Instagram, he'll embark on an adventurous journey full of discoveries.

recommendations.title: A Ticket to Space
recommendations.overview: Face à l'incompréhension de la population française quant au montant des crédits alloués à la recherche spatiale, le gouvernement lance une vaste opération de communication. En partenariat avec le Centre spatial français, un grand jeu est organisé. "

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.
